Author: Iluay
Name: Singingway
Punchline: Ever wanted to sing along during savage progging, obliterating the ears of your static? Now you can!
Description: Singingway displays the lyrics for the currently playing BGM on-screen, so you can sing to your heart's content.
Changelog:
- Added support for 7.5 and dalamud API 15.
- Added a Volume Settings tab.
